headline: Trump said $92 oil was 'only' high and would drop 'very big.' Oil tanked 9% in hours — but the clock is ticking
summary: After the president told Fox Business he'd be 'very surprised' if crude stayed at $92, Iran declared the Strait of Hormuz 'completely open.' There's a catch.

raw.headline: Trump said $92 oil was 'only' high and would drop 'very big.' Oil tanked 9% in hours — but the clock is ticking

headline: What is the AI opportunity for cruise lines?
summary: Investing.com -- Analysts at Barclays believe the cruise industry is uniquely positioned to reap substantial rewards from the proliferation of artificial intelligence. The technology could drive a significant surge in earnings by streamlining complex booking processes and reducing reliance on expensive third-party travel agents.

headline: Royal Caribbean and Carnival Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz boosted the broader cruise line sector.
